field_values.action_summary:
The protagonist travels with Sola and a massive military cavalcade consisting of two hundred decorated chariots drawn by enormous beasts across the landscape toward the dead sea bottom.

**Participating Characters:**
- The Protagonist
- Sola

**Participating Environments:**
- The Plaza/City (Departure)
- The Dead Sea Bottom (Approach)
field_values.emotional_beat:
Awe and intimidation at the sheer scale of the Martian military force.

**Likely Visual Coverage Families:**
- Wide establishing shots of the massive chariot procession.
- Tracking shots alongside the protagonist and Sola.
- Close-ups of the enormous animals pulling the chariots.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide establishing shots of the massive chariot procession; Tracking shots alongside the protagonist and Sola; Close-ups of the enormous animals pulling the chariots
movement_notes: Movement direction of the cavalcade must remain consistent across all units
Lighting consistency across the vast expanse of the dead sea bottom
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH007_SC001

## Production Intent
Execute a large-scale movement sequence featuring a military cavalcade of two hundred decorated chariots. The production must manage the logistics of enormous beasts and multiple chariot units to convey Martian military scale while transitioning characters from the Plaza/City departure point toward the Dead Sea Bottom.

## Required Cast
- The Protagonist
- Sola

## Required Environments
- The Plaza/City (Departure)
- The Dead Sea Bottom (Approach)

## Continuity Constraints
- Movement direction of the cavalcade must remain consistent across all units.
- Lighting consistency across the vast expanse of the dead sea bottom.

## Beat List
- BT001: Departure from the Plaza/City with Sola and the protagonist.
- BT002: Transit across the landscape via a massive military cavalcade of two hundred decorated chariots.
- BT003: Approach to the remote incubator located on the dead sea bottom.
